title: MoreFood Mod
description: Welcome to MoreFood, the ultimate culinary expansion for Minecraft! This mod introduces a variety of new foods and two exciting new mobs to enhance your Minecraft experience.
body:
Welcome to MoreFood, the ultimate culinary expansion for Minecraft! This mod introduces a variety of new foods and two exciting new mobs to enhance your Minecraft experience.
New Mobs:

    Choco Cow:
        A delightful new mob that roams the plains of Minecraft, the Choco Cow provides a unique source of milk—chocolate milk! Milk these sweet creatures to get chocolate milk, which can be used in crafting delicious new treats.

    Turkey:
        The Turkey is a wild mob that can be found in forest biomes. Hunting turkeys will yield turkey meat, which can be cooked into a hearty Thanksgiving feast or used in various new recipes.

New Foods:

Expand your culinary repertoire with a plethora of new food items, each offering unique benefits and effects. Here’s a taste of what you can craft and enjoy:

    Burgers: Satisfy your hunger with a classic burger, made from bread, cheese, and cooked beef.
    Hamburgers: The perfect meal on the go! This variant includes all the burger essentials with the added delight of pickles and lettuce.
    Pancakes: Start your Minecraft mornings with a stack of fluffy pancakes, perfect with syrup or chocolate sauce.
    Chocolate Bars: Sweet and satisfying, these bars provide a quick energy boost for your adventures.
    Cheese: Craftable from milk, cheese can be used in a variety of recipes or enjoyed on its own.
    And much more! Experiment with different ingredients to discover new and delicious food items that will make your Minecraft meals truly memorable.

Features:

    New Crafting Recipes: Detailed recipes for all new food items and ingredients.
    Unique Mob Drops: Special drops from the Choco Cow and Turkey that are essential for crafting new foods.
    Enhanced Gameplay: New food items not only fill your hunger bar but also provide special effects and boosts.

 

We would love to hear your feedback! Please leave your comments and suggestions to help us improve and expand MoreFood. Join our community on [Forum/Discord Link] to share your experiences and get support.
